cards.title: Standard Fire & Special Perils (SFSP)
cards.content:
ΓÇó Covers Fire, Lightning, Explosion, Aircraft damage, Riots, Storms, and Floods.
ΓÇó Excludes: War, Nuclear risks, Pollution, and Spontaneous combustion.
ΓÇó Reinstatement Value Policy pays to replace the property as new (no depreciation).

cards.title: Marine Cargo Insurance
cards.content:
ΓÇó Covers goods in transit (Sea, Air, Road, Rail).
ΓÇó Specific Policy (Single trip) vs Open Policy (Multiple trips over a year).
ΓÇó Institute Cargo Clauses: ICC (A) is "All Risk". ICC (B) and (C) are "Named Perils" (C being most restricted).

items.text: CAR (Contractor's All Risk) & EAR (Erection All Risk): Covers projects during construction phase.
Machinery Breakdown (MB): Covers sudden physical damage to working machinery.
Business Interruption: Pays for fixed expenses and lost net profit if business stops due to Fire.

cards.title: Public & Professional Liability
cards.content:
ΓÇó Public Liability: Covers injury/damage to third parties on your premises.
ΓÇó Professional Indemnity: Protects Doctors, CAs, and Lawyers against claims of negligence.
ΓÇó Employer's Liability: Covers Workmen's Compensation Act obligations.

cards.title: Crime Insurance
cards.content:
ΓÇó Fidelity Guarantee: Protects employers against fraud/embezzlement by their own employees.
ΓÇó Banker's Indemnity: Package policy for banks covering money in transit, forged cheques, etc.

sections.title: ≡ƒÆí Exam Master Tips
items: Average Clause: If property is under-insured, claim amount is reduced proportionately.
Floater Policy: One single sum insured covering goods lying at multiple different locations.
Declaration Policy: For businesses with fluctuating stocks. Premium is adjusted based on monthly stock declarations.
Jeweller's Block Policy: A comprehensive package policy exclusively for jewelry shops.
Workmen's Compensation is a Statutory (legally mandatory) liability policy.
